text:
Created attachment 246791
Update games/moonlight-embedded

The patch is for 2 things.
1: For updating to version 2.6.2.
2: For moved from upstream to my own github repo temporarily in order to 
reduce patch files.

Changes:
   Fixed connection issue streaming from some hosts running GeForce Experience 
or Sunshine v0.20 and earlier.

From: https://github.com/moonlight-stream/moonlight-embedded/releases/tag/v2.6.2
Please check if there is anything missing.
